description_long: This is a medium-sized plastic beverage bottle with a dark brown body and a white screw cap. The bottle features a black label wrapped around its midsection, prominently displaying the Blender logo and text in white and orange. The bottle has a classic soda bottle shape, with a slightly contoured midsection for grip and a wider base for stability. The plastic appears glossy and smooth, with no visible scratches or damage. The cap is ribbed for easy twisting and removal, and the bottle seems to be filled with a dark liquid, likely a soft drink. The overall design is typical of commercial soft drink bottles found in urban environments.
description: A dark brown plastic beverage bottle with a white screw cap and a black label featuring the Blender logo and text. The bottle is glossy, smooth, and appears filled with liquid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Blender logo and text clearly on the black label, with the white cap visible on top.
description_view_1: Rotated view showing the side of the label, with part of the Blender logo and the edge of the text visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the full Blender logo and text on the label, with the bottle's shape and cap clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the logo portion of the label, with less text visible and the bottle's contour apparent.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle has a black label with the Blender logo in orange and white, and the word 'blender' in white text. The label wraps around the midsection of the bottle.
